A '''floatboat''' was a large atmospheric vessel utilized by the [[Ugnaught/Legends|Ugnaught]] species as the preferred form of transportation within the [[Life Zone/Legends|Life Zone]] between the Ugnaught city of [[Ugnorgrad/Legends|Ugnorgrad]] and [[Cloud City/Legends|Cloud City]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Bespin/Legends|Bespin]]. Large, floating bladders filled with [[Tibanna/Legends|Tibanna]] gas governed the ship's altitude.<ref name="ActionTidings2">{{Wizards|url=default.asp?x=starwars/article/sw20041007bespin2|series=Bespin: Action Tidings|text=Part 2: That Den o' Human Iniquity}}</ref>

==History==
[[Ugboat]] was the largest manufacturer of floatboats on the [[Ugnaught Surface/Legends|Ugnaught Surface]].<ref name="ActionTidings2" />

''[[Action Tidings]]'' [[Holojournalist/Legends|holojournalist]], [[Ars Fivvle]] worked upon two such vessels known as ''[[Floatboat 1]]'' and ''[[Floatboat 2]]'' during the [[Ugnaught rebellion]]. ''Floatboat 1'' was destroyed [[3 ABY/Legends|three years]] after the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], and Ars was forced to continue his work upon ''Floatboat 2''.

During the Ugnaught Rebellion, [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]] boarded ''Floatboat 2'' and used the ship's belt drive as a sling, firing projectiles into the path of advancing [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]] at the Ugnorgrad region known as [[Pleasant Meadow]]. Later, Ars and Lando piloted ''Floatboat 2'' to Cloud City, where the ship's crew assisted in a coup against the Imperial administrator, [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Hugo Treece]].

[[10 ABY/Legends|Ten years]] after the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], Ars Fivvle was still using ''Floatboat 2'' to broadcast episodes of ''Action Tidings''.

Floatboats also saw major use on [[Abregado-rae/Legends|Abregado-rae]] as semi-aquatic vehicles, where the native [[Gados]] used them to cross the canals of the [[Old Patch]] district, floating on the water and using repulsors over land.<ref name="CSWE">{{CSWECite|I|306|Gados floatboats}}</ref> A ride in one of these floatboats cost five to ten credits.<ref name="CatCW" />
